title: XHTML Strict Parse Validation on All .xhtml Files
description: All .xhtml files must pass strict XML parse. Use [xml](Get-Content path) in PS or xmllint --noout. Check after every XHTML edit. Current files: 8 workspace XHTML files.
notes: Routine: foreach ($f in Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Filter *.xhtml) { [xml](Get-Content $f.FullName -Raw) }. Session 3 fixed VersionTag comments in 3 files.
